text: 🚨 [ALERT] Payout batch failure detected for Stripe gateway. 154 transactions in status PENDING failed to settle. Error: Gateway timed out (504 Gateway Timeout) during payload handshake. Retrying in backoff mode.

@here Heads up team: it looks like some mobile app users are experiencing 400 Bad Request errors on checkout. We traced it back to an API version mismatch on the `/v2/payments` endpoint—the client is sending `v1.2` legacy headers which are no longer supported since last night's deploy.

Confirmed alice_dev. Checking logs on K8s cluster. Yes, seeing high error counts on `payment-gateway-service`. I will deploy a hotfix fallback middleware to accept the legacy header temporarily while we roll out a forced app store update.

🚨 [ALERT] Batch settlement task `daily_ach_reconciliation` failed. Details: Unable to parse remote SFTP CSV file from Apex Clearing. Line 432 has an invalid formatting mismatch on field `clearing_house_id` (expected 9 digits, got 8). EOD accounting balance is out of sync by $245,392.10.
